name: academorix/organization
purpose: Organization aggregate — structural sub-brand belonging to a Tenant, nestable at Enterprise tier, with an auto-provisioned default row per Tenant.
capabilities: Organization Eloquent model (org_...) with parent_id nesting
Nesting gated by organization_hierarchy feature flag
when_to_use: Modelling a tenant that runs multiple brands under one customer account (Enterprise tier).
when_not_to_use: For commercial + regulatory zones (currency, tax, timezone), use the sibling academorix/region package.
